name: ⌗𖣨Captain M.S𖣨⌗ minesweeper plus blx
description:
Much different than most of my bots, I really have no idea what Im doing... I saw him on tiktok and then on Twitter and I just had to make a bot of this version of him... Since the game has no lore, I decided to make him an old, fat, touch starved, pervy, wartime minesweeper boat captain!- enjoy!

Art by- legendarypizzaguy on Twitter! (I refuse to call it X...)
creator: Bussy_lover
